payload.message: Execute ops-heartbeat skill. Read ~/.openclaw/workspace/ops/heartbeat_state.json and proposals.json. Run heartbeat logic. Write results to those files. Do not call any heartbeat API or POST to Railway. CRITICAL: After you finish, you MUST post a summary of your execution results (success or failure, what you did, any errors) to Slack #metrics channel (channel ID: C091G3PKHL2). This Slack report is MANDATORY and non-negotiable. Do not skip it under any circumstances.

Execute mission-worker skill. Read ~/.openclaw/workspace/ops/steps.json, take one step, run it, append result to ~/.openclaw/workspace/ops/completed/YYYY-MM-DD.json (today) and remove that step from steps.json. Do not call any step API or Railway. CRITICAL: After you finish, you MUST post a summary of your execution results (success or failure, what you did, any errors) to Slack #metrics channel (channel ID: C091G3PKHL2). This Slack report is MANDATORY and non-negotiable. Do not skip it under any circumstances.

Execute daily-memory skill. Extract today's learnings from session history, roundtable-standup の結果、および今日の cron の成功/失敗. Do NOT read AGENTS.md. Append to ~/.openclaw/workspace/daily-memory/lessons-learned.md. Write today's diary to ~/.openclaw/workspace/daily-memory/diary-YYYY-MM-DD.md (use today's date). CRITICAL: After you finish, you MUST post a summary of your execution results (success or failure, what you did, any errors) to Slack #metrics channel (channel ID: C091G3PKHL2). Execute moltbook-interact skill. Fetch feed, check own posts for new comments, reply up to 3 per cycle (optional new post). Write result to ~/.openclaw/workspace/moltbook-interact/run_YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today Asia/Tokyo). Output MUST follow the exact JSON format in the skill: date, executedAt, status, repliesCount, replies[] (commentId, permalink, repliedToContent, replyBody), createdPost (postId, permalink, postBody or null), errorMessage. CRITICAL: After you finish, post to Slack #metrics (channel ID: C091G3PKHL2) using the exact Slack format in the skill: 1) skill name and result, 2) date and time JST, 3) result as Japanese summary + permalink link for each reply/post (NO full JSON paste), 4) remarks or 'なし'. This Slack report is MANDATORY.

This Slack report is MANDATORY.

Execute reelfarm skill in LOOP A mode (Daily Metrics Iteration). Read ~/.openclaw/skills/reelfarm/SKILL.md and follow the 'Cron Mode: Daily Metrics Iteration (LOOP A)' section exactly. API key: rf_DgLHPO6BylVQ8wS_oqMnhrAgLqee3cuvbnQl1S_wTL8. Step 1: GET /automations to list all active automations dynamically. Step 2: GET /tiktok/accounts to build account ID→username mapping. Step 3: For each automation, GET /tiktok/posts?automation_id={id}&timeframe=7 for 7-day metrics. Step 4: For each automation, score hooks (views*0.4+likes*0.3+comments*0.2+shares*0.1), identify top 3 and bottom 3, generate replacement hooks in emotional 2nd-person style, PATCH /automations/{id} with updated hooks. Save results to ~/.openclaw/workspace/reelfarm/metrics/YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today Asia/Tokyo). CRITICAL: After you finish, you MUST post a summary of your execution results to Slack #metrics channel (channel ID: C091G3PKHL2). Use the exact report format in the LOOP A section of the skill. This Slack report is MANDATORY and non-negotiable. Do not skip it under any circumstances.

Execute reelfarm skill in LOOP B mode (Weekly Library Exploration). Read ~/.openclaw/skills/reelfarm/SKILL.md and follow the 'Cron Mode: Weekly Library Exploration (LOOP B)' section exactly. API key: rf_DgLHPO6BylVQ8wS_oqMnhrAgLqee3cuvbnQl1S_wTL8. Step 1: GET /library/niches to check available niches (some return 0 profiles — skip those). Step 2: For niches with profiles, GET /library?niche=X to find viral slideshows (sort by views). Step 3: Analyze top hooks from viral content. Step 4: GET /automations + GET /tiktok/posts to check posting capacity (6/day limit per account). Step 5: If capacity available, POST /automations with auto_pull_images:true and all_slides:'auto' in image_settings. Step 6: Before creating, GET /slideshows?status=queued to verify queue is not full (if >100 queued, skip creation and notify). Save results to ~/.openclaw/workspace/reelfarm/library/YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today Asia/Tokyo). CRITICAL: After you finish, you MUST post a summary of your execution results to Slack #metrics channel (channel ID: C091G3PKHL2). Use the exact report format in the LOOP B section of the skill. This Slack report is MANDATORY and non-negotiable. Do not skip it under any circumstances.
